params.name: Alexandria Model
params.description: The Alexandria Model is primarily based on the structural design of the ancient Alexandria Museum. The Alexandria Museum, built in the third century BC in Alexandria, Egypt, by Ptolemy I Soter, is the world's first museum. It was not only a center for academic research and cultural exchange but also an important venue for the dissemination of ancient Greek culture. The core building of the museum was the Temple of the Muses, which is the origin of the word "museum" in Western languages. Addition …
